description_long: This object is a modern corded phone with a rectangular base and a vertically standing handset. The front features a digital display screen above a numeric keypad, which includes standard call and navigation buttons. The base is broad and flat, providing stability, and the handset is integrated into the design, standing upright without a visible coiled cord. The phone is primarily black with a glossy finish, and the buttons are slightly raised for tactile feedback. The sides and back are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing a minimalist, contemporary aesthetic. This type of phone is typically found in private settings such as homes or offices.
description: A sleek, black corded phone with a digital display and keypad, standing upright on a glossy rectangular base. The design is modern and minimal, with tactile buttons and a smooth finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital display, full keypad, and call/navigation buttons.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile of the handset and the flat, glossy base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unfeatured back of the handset and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and base.
